summary:
WEATHER MANIPULATION AND SPIRITUAL AUTHORITY: Brandon discusses his visions of governments, including those of China and the United States, utilizing advanced technology and devices like HAARP to manipulate weather patterns and orchestrate catastrophic events. He links these weather warfare tactics to severe floods and recent fires in Hawaii and California. In response to these man-made natural disasters, Brandon emphasizes the importance of utilizing spiritual authority. He encourages believers to exercise dominion over their designated geographical areas by applying the blood of Jesus, taking communion daily, and speaking faith-filled words to alter the weather, stop droughts, and break generational curses of poverty and sickness.

POLITICAL PREDICTIONS AND ASSASSINATION PLOTS: Brandon outlines threats against Donald Trump, predicting efforts to use the 25th Amendment to remove him from office and describing a specific assassination plot involving concentrated snake venom applied to a hat to induce a fatal, heart-attack-like event. He also warns of a future scandal surrounding J.D. Vance in 2028, comparing it to a new Watergate that will allegedly involve Elon Musk acting as an informant to save himself. Expressing his political preference, Brandon supports Marco Rubio and Byron Donalds for higher office while characterizing Vance as a chameleon with an elitist mentality. Furthermore, he emphasizes the necessity of the Save America Act and voter ID laws to combat corrupt politicians and fraudulent voting by illegal immigrants.

GLOBAL PROPHECIES AND FUTURE EVENTS: Brandon shares a wide array of global predictions, including a major biological weapon emerging from Cuba and a rat-borne plague spreading across Europe by 2028. He foresees massive, land-splitting earthquakes striking Hong Kong, Portland, Seattle, Vancouver, and San Francisco. Additionally, Brandon predicts shifting international dynamics, such as Vladimir Putin deploying unconventional weapons and holding his strategic cards until Trump's term ends, while the Kremlin faces drone strikes. He also makes specific claims about public figures, asserting that Alex Jones will survive an assassination attempt to become a major religious voice, Tucker Carlson will turn against the church, and Candace Owens will face a targeted vehicle attack.

TECHNOLOGICAL WARNINGS AND CERN: Brandon warns of an impending era dominated by quantum computing and artificial intelligence, asserting that these advancements carry dark, demonic underpinnings tied to events like the summer solstice and rituals at Stonehenge. He specifically points to the European Organization for Nuclear Research, known as CERN, claiming their search for dark matter and facility upgrades slated for 2030 are connected to a rising socialist control of the internet. Brandon describes visions of digital tentacles clamping down on alternative media and livestreams, interpreting these technological shifts as a globalist effort to restrict freedom and monitor the public.

SPIRITUAL URGENCY AND NATIONAL PROTECTION: Brandon urges individuals to repent and abandon their lukewarm faith, warning that an impending spiritual shaking is not an act of divine judgment but rather an act of mercy designed to awaken a selfish world. He prophesies upcoming disruptions, including a shaking in Israel that will damage the Dome of the Rock, a financial shaking in Rome, and a deceptive alien event. Looking ahead to the Fourth of July celebrations, Brandon calls for heightened spiritual protection over major American cities and the President against domestic terrorist plots, while simultaneously claiming that five Mafia families will unexpectedly rise up to fight against creeping socialism.
rawData: [June 29, 2026]-[Come pray with me]-[https://youtu.be/Nbb5gUwTSE0]-[To all you that are joining us now, thank you for being here tonight. Let's pray tonight. We really are just going to show you a couple of little things and we're going to pray. I'm late tonight, and so we're going to just jump right in the river and pray tonight. I'm going to do things a little differently, and we'll see how it goes here. But I believe it will go great. I want to show you some things that are on my heart. I want to go into what we've talked about in the past about weather manipulation and weather warfare. When I saw that they would use the weather with certain governments to manipulate things with catastrophic events—major catastrophic events where it would rain so much in one area and so quickly that the floods would be so bad and people would say, 'This is not natural.' As I have been praying, this is what's happening. I believe we're about to see an escalation of this, and people say, 'Is it seeding? Are they seeding the weather? Are they seeding the clouds?' I see it as some kind of device. People say HAARP, Brandon, it's HAARP. Last time I remember we got so many emails: 'People, this is HAARP, this is this and that.' I don't know. I saw it with China, and as I see, the United States is able to do it, as we saw all the fires in Hawaii. We saw the fires in the Malibu area. We saw all the things that were—well, was it an arsonist? All this stuff and how it spread—and they were ignorant and they didn't have the—not Malibu—all over the course of time in California, there are certain fires. Well, they didn't let things burn off; they didn't let all this stuff. Yeah, that could be. I don't want to be a conspiracy theorist; I try to tell you what I see whenever I'm praying. When they had the blue roofs, and they talked about the blue roofs and how they didn't burn—you know, I don't know about all that. All I know is I saw that they were using weather and they were using some kind of weapon to cause catastrophic events, and that's what I saw. So, I see in part, I hear in part, but I don't want to add to or take away from anything by what you see in a conspiracy on the internet when you're death scrolling on your phone and you're looking at all the stuff you see on social media. So, that's part of it. I try not to do that, you know, but I see what I see. And as I'm praying and I'm praying against these earthquakes, I see something. I'm seeing something that is not natural, that is man-made somehow. And so, like I said, I don't want to get into weirdness, but I'm just trying to give you a little hint of something that I want you to pray about. I want you to pray about catastrophic events taking place and fearful sights that you will see that will bring you to your knees. I told you there's something coming that is bigger than what we've ever seen before with the signs of the times and the coming of the Lord Jesus Christ. And the enemy knows where we are, and he's trying to bring fear; he's trying to stir people up. I know what he's doing; you can see what he's doing in the media all the time. But we know who we are, and we know we have authority over the enemy. He's not able to run us around and have us chasing our tail unless we allow him to do it. We must stand our ground in these last days as believing believers and take our authority over him. Jesus made us joint heirs with him whenever he died and rose again on that third day. He did it all, ladies and gentlemen. But what is amazing about what Jesus did was: as he is, so are we in this world. He lives on the inside of us. The Holy Ghost lives on the inside of us. We are wall-to-wall Holy Ghost. And when you have that power and authority, the same Holy Spirit that raised Jesus from the dead dwells on the inside of you richly by faith. And we have authority over this stuff. If Jesus could speak to the weather and tell the waves that were roaring, 'Peace, be still,' and he was asleep on the back of the boat and his disciples were freaking out saying, 'Do you not care that we're about to die?' He said, 'Oh, ye of little faith. Peace, be still.' Boom! I wish I would have been there that day. Would you? Would that have been amazing? To speak to the waves, to speak to the storms—the same firepower that Jesus had, he gave it to us. And he said, 'Speak to the storms. Speak to the waves. Speak to your storm.' And it's not even just the natural storm; your spiritual storms. Whatever you're going through in your life, you have power and authority to tread on serpents and scorpions, and nothing shall by any means hurt you. So, everything I want to tell you tonight is hope. But yet, we're not doing what God's told us to do. A lot of us—I know there are some of you that are; I don't want to say all of us—but I'm saying there's a lot of people that are just not doing what they're supposed to be doing and praying over their areas. You have dominion and authority over your area where you are. Maybe your town—maybe you live in a little town, so God put you in that little town, and you're like, 'I don't know why I'm here.' Well, you're here to pray for your people. You're here to pray. You be where God's graced you to be. Some people are in a little town, some people in a big city, but God puts you in these areas and he says, 'I want you to pray over your schools. I want you to pray over the churches.' So, you're stationed there. It's like being in the army. You're stationed there and you're like, 'I don't want to be stationed here. I don't want to be in Okinawa. I don't want to be in these places,' right? I want to be where it's a big city and fun, and I want to—I don't know, maybe Hawaii. That'd be a good place to be stationed. You could go and suffer for Jesus, suffer for the government then. But I want you to take your position of authority seriously in these last days. You must rise up and be bigger inside. Let Jesus be big inside of you. Stop thinking small. Jesus paid the price so that we have victory in every area of our life. And so when I go over some of the things that I'm going to show you, you have the opportunity: you can be in fear, or you can talk about what we see on this channel. People say, 'Brandon, you bring so much fear.' I don't bring fear. That's your stance and what you're hearing, being aware of the signs of the times. That's how you received it. I'm not trying to bring it to you in fear. I'm trying to bring it to you and tell you, 'This is the enemy's plan.' But God has the ability. We have the ability because of Christ in me—the hope of glory. Ladies and gentlemen, it's not about fear; it's about a relationship. And he shows us that which is to come and for us to pray into this to stop the killing, stealing, and destroying. The Bible says the devil comes to kill, to steal, and to destroy. I have come that you might have life and life more abundantly to the extreme, until it overflows. You want to have overflow in your life. So what is God automatically telling you? That you have the ability to tread on those serpents and scorpions, but you have to do it by faith. We have to submit ourselves unto God, resist the devil, and he will flee. But if you don't do it, guess what happens? He is the devourer; he's going to devour everything you have. He's going to steal, kill, and destroy. And that's what his whole MO, method of operation, is—to make your life miserable. Well, guess what? We have the ability to take anointing oil, and we apply the blood of Jesus. This is a representation of the blood of Jesus. When you anoint your children with oil, you anoint your wife with oil, you anoint yourself with oil, your house with oil, and your car with oil, I believe the blood of Jesus covers us, and that's where that dominion authority lies. It's right there in the blood. We make much of the blood, and the blood makes much of us. When we make much of the blood—what Jesus did—the blood speaks for me. The blood that was shed on Calvary—I'm telling you, that's what gives us power and authority. It's at that mercy seat; it speaks to me; it's my attorney. That's why I take communion every day. I've got boxes of them. It's not religious to me; this is a relationship. I tell you that all the time. When you get that down inside of you—that this isn't something the Catholics do or we just do as a sacrament; yes, it's holy and honorable, and this is why we do it—but I look at it and say, 'Jesus, I'm here. I love you. You're my friend, and I have power and authority.' Like I said, when you start visualizing and get a revelation inside of your head, it gets down in your heart. You catch it, and then I'm going to place it down here. I want to get it so deep down. I want to be like a bulldog on a bone with this so that I can pray for the sick and they'll recover. We can cast out devils in His name; we can raise the dead in His name. Either you believe it or you don't. Well, you might say, 'I prayed for that guy and he died.' Well, you know what? You keep trying. You keep believing and standing on the Word. You keep getting that Word down in your heart. The bigger the Word gets inside of you, the bigger the tree. It may start out as an acorn, but the more you pray and get this beautiful book down inside of you, it will change you from the inside out. Well, you know, 'I prayed for Grandma and she had cancer and she died.' Well, what was she saying? She said, 'I'm ready to go home, son.' I said, 'Well, I'm believing you're going to live. You can't go.' A house divided against itself will not stand. If she wants to go home and you're believing she's going to stay, guess what? She'll have what she says. The Bible says you'll have what you say, not what everybody else says. You know how many people try to curse me or take me down? I don't care what you say; I know what He said. 'Greater is He that is in you than he that is in the world. A thousand shall fall at your side and 10,000 at your right hand, but nothing's going to come nigh you, son. Just do what I tell you to do, and I've got you. I have more that are with me than against me. The angels of the Lord are camped around about me.' So it doesn't matter what you say; it's what I say. Life and death are in the power of your tongue. So what you are saying matters, not what they're saying. That's what I'm trying to tell you. I don't care what they say; everybody has an opinion. They can say what they want to say, but what are you saying about yourself? Do you say you want to live? People say, 'I'm going to curse you to death.' I don't care what they say because life and death are in the power of my tongue, not yours, concerning what you're speaking against me. I don't care. Every tongue that rises against me, I condemn. You've got to believe it. I condemn the words that have been spoken against me; they don't bear any fruit in my life. If they say, 'You'll never be good; you're good for nothing. You'll never make money. You're never going to do anything with your life,' I don't believe a word of it. It's a lie. You know why? Because the Bible says in Deuteronomy 28, 'I'm blessed in the city, I'm blessed in the field, I'm blessed coming in, and I'm blessed going out.' A generational curse of poverty is broken off of my life. They may be poor, but it has nothing to do with me. The seeds I sowed in the past will come to harvest at last. The sowers and the reaper are going hand in hand. The blessing has overtaken me. Goodness and mercy will follow me all the days of my life, and I will dwell in the house of the Lord forever. That's the kind of God I serve. I'm not living in 'barely getting by.' I'm not going to live in sickness, disease, poverty, and lack. I'm going to keep speaking it until I see the manifestation of it. I'm going to keep believing what this Word says and quoting it until I see the manifestation of it. Well, it starts with an acorn; it starts with a seed. A seed will produce a tree if you water it, put it in good soil, and keep cultivating it. You'll say, 'Wow, the seed's growing! The acorn is growing! Look at that seed, wow!' Because seedtime and harvest always work. Seedtime and harvest will always work. If you sow, you will reap. If you sow a seed into your wife, you'll have a baby. Seedtime and harvest always work. Speak to the seedtime and harvest. You see, everything is produced to grow, mature, and become much. It keeps going and going. As long as the earth remains, seedtime and harvest will always exist. That's what the Bible says; I believe it's in Genesis. The grass withers and the flowers fade, but the Word of the Lord will remain forever. I want to encourage you today. That's why I tell you not to get down whenever I tell you some of this stuff; it's because we have to come against it. A watchman sees on the edge of the horizon of time and sees what's coming: the rest of 2026, 2027, 2028, 2029. Shaking in the church. I'm waking up my church. It's not sad or scary. People are dying and going home—that's the cycle of life. Shaking in the church, shaking in elders, shaking in things. This is what I'm going to do. Will you rise up and take the baton? Will you do what I've called you to do, church? It's the battle cry. Where are you in the last days? Are you going to be one that is all in or all out? I'm going to be all in. I'm going to be doing exactly what He told me to do in these end times, and I'm going to follow Him until the day I take my last breath. On the other side, I'm still going to be doing whatever He asks me to do over there. I am sold out to God. No matter where I'm at, on this side or the other, I'm sold out. It's not always going to be easy to do what He tells you to do. So, back to the weather. I saw a manipulation of the weather. I saw a mega dust bowl trying to set in some areas. But I call in the weather. I call in rain all the time. We've had record-breaking rain and flooding; it's been amazing. We call in the rain and I say, 'I'm not moved by what I see.' Sometimes it takes a little bit to pull a low; sometimes it takes a little bit when you're speaking into the weather. You say, 'Well, I didn't see it the first day.' I call in the rain all the time. We will not have drought over our area; we will not have drought in the name of Jesus. We speak to the rain. I call in rain from the north, south, east, and west: 'You come in the name of Jesus, water our ground, our crops, and our trees, and we will not have drought.' In the name of Jesus, thank you, Lord, that You provide us this rain. That's it, and you give God praise for it. I take the care out of my prayer. I'm not full of care concerning that. I'm just trusting. Thank you, Lord. You got this. Bring in the rain. And the rain comes. Well, if it starts getting a little too hot, Father, I thank you, Lord. You bring some cooler temperatures down from the Canadian air. Bring us some cool air down here, Lord. It's getting too hot. We don't want to scorch down here. Thank you, Lord, for some cooler air. So, that's why I encourage you, but I see weather manipulation with the government. And that's why I say, well, how does that work? Well, we wrestle not against flesh and blood, right? We're wrestling against principalities. Principalities work through personalities. So you're wrestling with governments—China and some of these other governments, our own government's doing some stuff, right? So we start praying for the people who are doing it because they're yielding themselves over to a devil. We say, 'No, we're not going to have that. We're not going to have voter fraud. We're not going to have these things. We're going to pray over it. We're going to ask God to deal with the corruption in our government.' They say, 'Well, we don't want to vote the SAVE America Act in.' Why not? Well, because they're corrupt politicians. Anybody who doesn't vote for the SAVE America Act is a corrupt politician. You are a fraud. Anybody who doesn't want voter ID and have you present your ID—do you know how many times people even ask me to present my ID for something that's stupid? Voting is important, but you're going to tell me you don't want to have that voted in. Why? Because you're a corrupt politician. Why do you want to lobby against that? Because you're doing something fraudulent. You're taking handouts. You're taking some kind of money laundering or doing something bad there. It doesn't make any sense to have illegal people coming across the border and able to vote in your election that are not even an American citizen. That is stupid. But we don't want to vote for that. So why? Because you have corrupt people in positions of authority. So we pray for those people to get out. Is it impossible? No. All things are possible to him who believes. So I want to show you what I told you was coming for the 25th Amendment concerning President Trump and after the midterms. I said, 'If we do not pray for him and for the red wave that we need—even in Oklahoma, we need senators, we need governors.' And I told you, I saw Stacey Abrams. I saw a funneling, and Braden has been doing research. Over $2 billion was funneled to Stacey Abrams is what people were saying. Braden was doing some of the research. I said, 'This is a hot spot.' The Lord said, 'Watch Georgia.' The devil went down to Georgia. The Lord used that. So what did the devil do? It's the church. I saw Atlanta and I saw districts that were corrupt and they're going to try to take the Senate seats. They're going to try to take the governor. The Lord said, 'Pray for Minnesota. Pray for Minnesota. Pray for as we see Mamdani rising up with its communistic evil people. Four major evil positions coming out of that were socialist. That's not normal. Who votes for that trash? People who have a reprobate mind, right? But we know where we are in this end time. People say, 'You shouldn't be in politics.' Yes, if you don't get more involved in politics as a Christian and start praying for a nation, you're going to lose your nation. Well, I don't know. Whatever will be, will be. That's what I heard in the spirit. Que Sera, Sera, whatever will be, will be. That's not the way a Christian believes. That's not a 'whatever will be, will be.' When you have dominion authority, what does that tell you? You've got to pray. And that's why we're here. But I want you to hear what I told you is coming concerning President Trump. And I said, 'They're going to come against him really hard. And if you don't get out and vote in November, you'll see a blue wave.' I say he'll be a stalemate president. That's what I keep getting: a stalemate president, a blue area. And I want to call it a blue wave—a slight blue wave concerning the Senate. That's not fair to say a blue wave. It was that they win the Senate. And I saw them coming against him very strong with the judges and the Senate. I saw the House was cowards and they remained red. But I want you to see what they're already saying again concerning your president. This is today. Go ahead. Thank you, Chairman Aguilar. Inflation is up. Grocery prices are up. Utility costs are up. Housing prices are up. We have a bipartisan housing bill that both the Congress and Senate passed. There was supposed to be a big signing ceremony today in the Capitol and then all of a sudden Donald Trump decides he's not coming to sign the bill. Well, why is that? Did he wake up on the wrong side of the bed? Is he unable to stay awake today? What's causing him to chicken out again? Is it Taco Wednesday? Or is it side effects from a drug? We don't know. This erratic behavior of the president is very concerning. He has trouble staying awake at multiple White House events and Cabinet meetings. He has clearly some weakness in one of his arms. He's got swelling in his hands and the White House needs to come clean. What we know is there's a report saying that one person in America got this special new drug. It was a 79-year-old person who's very high profile. And this drug can only be given to someone under the compassionate use provision. Meaning you do that if someone basically has a terminal illness. So we need to know: did Donald Trump get this special drug from Eli Lilly and did he get it under that provision? And if he did, why is that the case? So what is this new drug? I'm trying to figure out what he's talking about, Braden. Yeah, I don't know. What's this new drug? So supposedly they're accusing Trump of taking this new medication and it's for sleeping, but it's terminal. But as I have been praying for Trump, I've seen an attack against his heart and his veins and he keeps going and doing all these things with the medical and saying he's getting checkups and everything else. He's 80 years old, you know. I don't know many 80-year-olds that are running a nation. Yeah, they have a point. He's old, but God, I believe, has put him in a position to help us right now. Thank God we do not have Kamala Harris. I'm just being real with you. Thank God. And so we're praying against the attacks against his life. I believe that he'll have long life and he'll be here until it's time for him to go home. But I believe that we have to sustain him in prayer for taking him across that finish line with the mission that he has. I saw attacks against his life. And what's interesting was I saw a black mamba or brown snake being used against him somehow with poison to make it look like he has a natural heart attack with some kind of poisoning. Now, you have to have a cut in your gums or if you ingest it, it has to be aspirated or whatever from what I understand. But if they got it in a cut—I said a cat scratch on the brim of your hat. I keep seeing a hat whenever he puts his hat on. A scratch with venom on it, concentrated venom, and I saw him grasping his throat. And his throat was red. It was as red as a tomato, like he was grasping at his throat and like he was having a cardiac event with like a stroke. It was something like he was grabbing his throat and I saw him pass out, but it was an infection. It was inflicted by poison. It wasn't a true stroke or a heart attack, but it looked like natural causes. So, they weren't medicating him for a stroke, like trying to help him with CPR, whatever they were doing. It was because of poison. I thought it was interesting because I keep seeing that. I was praying against it. Then I saw him holding a candle and a birthday cake that had one candle in it. I thought, "What is this?" because I was praying against him going to Turkey, praying against him going to these places; he needs to stay home and focus on America. I was praying against that and I got cranky about it, and I shouldn't have. If he feels led to go to Turkey, then we'll pray for him when he goes to Turkey. When he presented the pig to Turkey in the days ahead, the ham to Turkey—I saw that and I was like, "That was very interesting." As J.D. Vance has. I said J.D. Vance will come out. He has been a chameleon, and in the days ahead by midterm, he's going to come out for who he is. I saw a Harvard mentality, and then people say, "What does that mean?" Ivy League education. Am I calling him Harvard? No, he didn't go to Harvard; he went to Yale. But I saw that kind of mentality of the Ivy League education coming out more strongly—of who he truly is in the days ahead, trying to separate himself from Trump for his run for presidency. People will see the real J.D. Vance in the days ahead. People say, "Are you against J.D. Vance?" I don't know J.D. Vance. I haven't prayed for J.D. Vance like I have prayed for President Trump; I'm just being real with you. But what I get about J.D. Vance is not what I like. I like Marco Rubio. There's something about when I pray for Marco Rubio; I have a pulling to pray for him. I feel stronger for Marco Rubio in my spirit than I do for J.D. Vance. I heard he has his tens of thousands and he would have his thousands concerning Cuba and the things in the days ahead. Praying for Marco Rubio. I believe in my spirit that Marco Rubio should be president, not J.D. Vance. Now, that's what I get when I pray. You say, "Well, I don't agree with you." Well, that's fine. We can agree to disagree. You don't always have to agree with me. Just because you watch me, you say, "Well, I don't agree with you, Brandon." Okay, that's great. But I'm praying for Byron Donalds in Florida to rise up. I see him rising up as a major voice in the days ahead. Praying for Byron Donalds to keep strong. I see J.D. Vance as a chameleon. I saw him as a bobblehead with a small neck, and his head was too big and he was bobbling around. I saw a peacock come upon the Capitol. I saw this peacock wrap around the Capitol with a tail, and it started to bow its head down as I saw a major storm as he was on the hill. I could see him at the top looking down at the White House. I saw Marco Rubio at the bottom of the steps. I know this is a metaphor. It wasn't a time show. The Lord is trying to—he gives like this is coded. But I thought it was interesting as I saw President Trump in the White House and I saw a demonic spirit pecking at his brain, and we see this stuff happening. But as we see J.D. Vance in the days ahead, I said you will see in 2028 they will call it the "new Watergate." I saw Nixon and I saw J.D. Vance and I saw Elon Musk and him doing something together. I saw an impeachment trying to come against J.D. Vance in the days ahead, trying to come against what he's trying to do. There would be—I would hear a scandal. I don't want to call it an impeachment because that means he's president, and I didn't see that. I saw a scandal. That's what I saw: a scandal concerning J.D. Vance, and they would call this a "new Watergate." It was major, but it involved Elon Musk somehow. I saw this thing happening and people were like, "What does that mean?" I don't know. I see him part here, part there; does he make president? I don't know. I saw they would call this a scandal and I saw Elon Musk becoming a rat to bail out himself. Now, I saw—I keep calling him a rat. Pray for the rat. I've kept telling you this; it will happen in the days ahead. Now I want you to see what he said again about him being Nixon. "I relate with Nixon." This is something. This is something that I'm telling you. Do you have it? I thought you had it up. So, people are saying, "Are you picking at him?" No. I'm trying to tell you what I saw back in November of last year is coming to pass right now. He's talking it. He's saying it. Look, you have it? Yeah, play it. "So, we were talking about this a little bit backstage, but I'm actually fascinated by Nixon as a character in history. I think that his historical legacy is enjoying a bit of a renaissance, but I think deservedly so. As I joked with Robert backstage, if Watergate happened tomorrow, it would be like a 12-hour news story. Like, the idea that it would have taken down a presidency is crazy. And by the way, if you look at the story of how the deep state took down Richard Nixon, it's not all that different from what the same groups of people, the same institutions tried to do to Donald Trump in the first Trump administration. There is a parallel." Is he making justification for what he's doing? I'm just asking. Also, just at a personal level—and I'm not against him, but this is what the Lord showed me and it will come out in the days ahead. Young senator, vice president, writes some best-selling books, is hated by the media... it kind of sounds like J.D. Vance. So, I'm a little... yeah, I've always liked Richard Nixon. But, okay, one other thing about Richard. Do you see? I said, "This is what you'll see in 2028." I saw this big in the headlines; it was all over the papers. That's what I saw. In his mind, he's already justifying it. It sounds like, "Is he trying to make a call? Is he already covering himself?" I thought that's interesting just because of the things that I see. I see it coming; it's coming in the news in 2028. It was all over the papers. The Lord said, "Pray for this." I saw Elon Musk was involved and I saw them. I made this for you back last year so you would see this. My son made that for you to tell you the things that I was praying over. I saw Marilyn Monroe and I saw a Marilyn Monroe scandal coming.
